title: rubus calligynus
intro: Rubus calligynus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus calligynus include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to aid in the management of diabetes and certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus calligynus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
